subject: [PATCH v5 16/21] nfsd: allow encoding a filehandle into fattr4 without a svc_fh

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch allows the encoding of a filehandle into fattr4 without requiring a svc_fh. It achieves this by adding a new 'fhandle' field to struct nfsd4_fattr_args and copying the filehandle into it from the svc_fh in cases where the filehandle is needed but a svc_fh is not available, such as in CB_NOTIFY callbacks.
